summary_en: OHMORIYA authorized acquisition of up to 20,000 treasury shares (0.40% of outstanding) for ¥18.2M via ToSTNeT-3 on May 19, 2026, to enable flexible capital allocation in response to changing business environment.
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Purchase of Treasury Stock via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: On May 18, 2026, OHMORIYA Co., Ltd. (TSE Standard, Code 2917) announced a board resolution authorizing the acquisition of treasury shares pursuant to Company Law Article 165(3), read in conjunction with Article 156. The company will purchase up to 20,000 shares (representing 0.40% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥18,200,000. The buyback will be executed via Tokyo Stock Exchange off-hours trading (ToSTNeT-3) on May 19, 2026 at the closing price of ¥910 per share from May 18. The stated rationale is to enable flexible capital allocation in response to changes in the business environment. As of March 31, 2026, the company held 117,364 treasury shares against 4,980,732 issued shares (excluding treasury stock). Results will be announced after the trading session concludes on May 19.
